description_long: This is a sleek, black sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a wide stance, designed for high-speed urban driving. The car features bold, custom graphics including a fierce tiger and stylized smoke motifs on the hood and sides, giving it a striking and aggressive appearance. Its body is streamlined with a prominent rear wing spoiler for added downforce and stability at high speeds. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are large with a modern, multi-spoke design, enhancing its performance-oriented look. The car has two doors, a low front grille, and detailed headlights, emphasizing its sporty character. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, typical of high-performance vehicles.
description: A black, low-profile sports car with custom tiger and smoke graphics, large multi-spoke wheels, and a prominent rear spoiler. Its aggressive styling and aerodynamic shape highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive hood graphics, low grille, and sleek headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tiger and smoke graphics, large wheels, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide stance, rear spoiler, and visible exhaust details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the tiger graphic and aerodynamic lines.
